explanation.summary: Fats are carrying this food most, while fats are the biggest drag. It lands in D tier.
explanation.whyThisTier: This food lands in D tier with an overall score of 3 from a base nutrition score of 30. Context dragged it down by 27 points.

topPros.title: often inexpensive
topPros.explanation: A practical reason it still exists in real kitchens.

topCons.title: processing is a major category negative

closing.summary: Margarine does have a few real-world upsides. but the nutrition case is still weak and the downsides drag it down hard. best only in small amounts when the cooking job matters more than the nutrition case.
closing.useCaseNote: Best only in small amounts when the cooking job matters more than the nutrition case.
closing.cta: Would you rank it the same, or nah?
